form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming ran last of 10 at Doomben Cl6-Sw on February 21 over 1110m, 6 len behind Taltarni Fields with 52kg at $19. Second-up won by 1.1 len at Ipswich Cl4 March 20 over 1100m defeating New Hampshire carrying 58kg at $6.50. Expect her to hold that form now.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming ran last in a small field at Gold Coast Bm65 on March 7 over 1000m, slow going 7 len behind Tarps carrying 63kg at $16. Second-up 3rd of 8 at this track Bm68 on March 25 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Impact Zone with 58.5kg at $31. Not far from the winner last time and should be getting near his peak.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Third-up today and won third-up previously. Second-up 3rd of 8 at this track Bm68 on March 25 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Impact Zone with 58.5kg at $31. Not far from the winner last time and should be getting near his peak.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 700m, improved onto heels and had to be steadied.
Near the 800m, severely tightened for room, checked and blundered.
Bumped on jumping.
Raced wide throughout.
Raced keenly on heels when the pace slackened approaching the 500m.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign fifth of 8 at this track Bm70 December 13 over 1000m, soft track; 5 len behind Yoyo Yeezy carrying 59kg at $8.50. First up last campaign fifth of 12 at this track 0 - 70 October 18 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Bossed Up carrying 57kg at $7.50. Good fresh performer who must be considered.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). Resuming. Finished off last campaign fifth of 8 at this track Bm70 December 13 over 1000m, soft track; 5 len behind Yoyo Yeezy carrying 59kg at $8.50. First up last campaign fifth of 12 at this track 0 - 70 October 18 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Bossed Up carrying 57kg at $7.50. Good fresh performer who must be considered.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out under pressure over the concluding stages.
Obliged to alter course approaching the 100m.
Raced keenly in the early stages.
Held up rounding the home turn until approaching the 200m.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 3rd of 10 at Ipswich Bm65 on March 26 over 800m, 1.0 len behind Exceloquent carrying 58.5kg at $3.70. Previously second-up ran last of 9 at Doomben Bm70 on October 4 over 1110m, 12 len behind Cosmo Centaurus with 60kg at $81. Genuine galloper who should be thereabouts again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Second-up. First-up after three months 3rd of 10 at Ipswich Bm65 on March 26 over 800m, 1.0 len behind Exceloquent carrying 58.5kg at $3.70. Previously second-up ran last of 9 at Doomben Bm70 on October 4 over 1110m, 12 len behind Cosmo Centaurus with 60kg at $81. Genuine galloper who should be thereabouts again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide throughout without cover.
Began awkwardly. Entering the home straight, laid in under pressure.
Slow to begin.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of four months. Finished off last campaign ninth of 11 at Doomben Bm70 December 12 over 1200m, soft track; 3 len behind Amuseantes carrying 56kg at $13. When resuming last campaign third of 7 at Gold Coast Bm68 November 15 over 1000m, soft track; 2.5 len behind North Of Eli carrying 60kg at $7. Will give a good account.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resuming after a break of four months. Finished off last campaign ninth of 11 at Doomben Bm70 December 12 over 1200m, soft track; 3 len behind Amuseantes carrying 56kg at $13. When resuming last campaign third of 7 at Gold Coast Bm68 November 15 over 1000m, soft track; 2.5 len behind North Of Eli carrying 60kg at $7. Will give a good account.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, lost ground and inconvenienced shortly after the start.
Near the 150m, the hindquarters brushed.
Held up approaching and rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 2nd of 8 at Gold Coast Poly Bm70 on March 28 over 1150m, 1.0 len behind Tarps with 54.5kg at $9. The start before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 7 at Grafton March Hare on March 15 over 1175m, 0.6 len behind Poseidon's Son carrying 55kg at $6.50. Wasn?t too far off the mark last time. Must go in the numbers again.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping away.
In the middle stages, laid in.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming settled well back; won by 0.7 len at this track Cl3 February 28 over 1000m on a soft track defeating Hey Daisy carrying 55kg at $5. Last start 6th of 16 at Gold Coast Qtis Jewel 3yo on March 14 over 1200m, slow going 7 len behind Fabulantes carrying 57kg at $31. Well placed. Nicely placed back in this company and is sure to measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-10). Third-up today. Resuming settled well back; won by 0.7 len at this track Cl3 February 28 over 1000m on a soft track defeating Hey Daisy carrying 55kg at $5. Nicely placed back in this company and is sure to measure up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months did the work up front then tired 8th of 10 at Ipswich Cl2 on March 26 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Capital Heart carrying 59kg at $5. Previously second-up ran last in a small field at this track 3yo Hcp on November 4 over 1000m, 8 len behind Forgotten Spirit with 58kg at $6.50. Fitter for that run and expected to be in the finish this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Second-up. First-up after four months did the work up front then tired 8th of 10 at Ipswich Cl2 on March 26 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Capital Heart carrying 59kg at $5. Previously second-up ran last in a small field at this track 3yo Hcp on November 4 over 1000m, 8 len behind Forgotten Spirit with 58kg at $6.50. Fitter for that run and expected to be in the finish this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.
Carried out on jumping away.
Began awkwardly.
Near the 500m, raced in restricted room to the inside of Dismantle.
Shifted in on jumping and bumped Offenbach.
Shifted out on jumping and bumped Rustemo. Raced keenly in the early stages.
